hero.title: Welcome to Mas Dent Dental Clinic
hero.subtitle: Your smile is our priority. High-quality dental care with a gentle touch and state-of-the-art technology.
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive dental care for your whole family using the latest clinical techniques.
services.item1.title: Teeth Cleaning
services.item1.desc: Professional plaque removal and oral hygiene maintenance for a healthy mouth.
services.item2.title: Teeth Whitening
services.item2.desc: Brighten your smile with our safe and effective professional whitening treatments.
services.item3.title: Dental Implants
services.item3.desc: Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacement solutions for a complete smile.
services.item4.title: Orthodontics
services.item4.desc: Modern braces and clear aligners to straighten teeth for all ages.
services.item5.title: Root Canal
services.item5.desc: Gentle and painless root treatments to save your natural teeth.
services.item6.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.item6.desc: Transform your appearance with veneers, bonding, and full smile makeovers.

why.subtitle: We believe that every patient deserves a personalized experience in a calm and supportive environment.
why.item1.title: Experienced Doctors
why.item1.desc: Board-certified dental specialists with years of expertise.
why.item2.title: Modern Equipment
why.item2.desc: Cutting-edge digital imaging and laser technology.
why.item3.title: Comfortable Setting
why.item3.desc: Relaxing clinic atmosphere designed for your peace of mind.
why.item4.title: Affordable Pricing

test.title: Patient Success Stories
test.subtitle: Real feedback from our happy patients.
test.1.text: The best dental experience I've ever had. Dr. Sarah was so gentle and explained everything clearly. My teeth have never looked better!
test.1.name: Emily Thompson
test.2.text: I was terrified of root canals until I came here. The procedure was virtually painless and the recovery was quick. Highly recommended!
test.2.name: Mark Johnson
test.3.text: Mas Dent completely transformed my smile with implants. The team is professional, kind, and the results are stunning. Worth every penny.
test.3.name: Samantha Lee
test.4.text: From the moment I walked in, I felt comfortable. Exceptional care, state-of-the-art facility, and a truly caring team.
test.4.name: Michael Chen

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about your visit to Mas Dent Clinic.
faq.q1: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faq.a1: Please bring your ID, insurance card, and any previous dental records or X-rays if available.
faq.a2: Yes, we accept most major dental insurance plans. Our team can help you verify your coverage.
faq.q3: How often should I visit the dentist?
faq.a3: We generally recommend a check-up and cleaning every six months to maintain optimal oral health.
faq.q4: Do you offer emergency dental services?
faq.a4: Yes, we provide emergency dental care. Please call us immediately if you have a dental emergency.
faq.a5: Absolutely. Our professional whitening treatments are safe, effective, and performed under expert supervision.
